caption: A man with a beard, wearing a dark zip-up jacket over a light-colored shirt, is being interviewed outdoors in a park-like setting with green foliage in the background. He speaks into a microphone labeled with the "ANI" logo. The video is presented as a news broadcast from "NEWS 18 इंडिया," featuring various on-screen text overlays and inset photos of political figures, including Nitish Kumar. At the top, a red banner asks, "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?" while a yellow tag identifies the speaker as "तेजस्वी यादव, पूर्व डिप्टी CM, बिहार". A ticker at the bottom of the screen changes over time; it initially reads "बिहार के डिप्टी CM बने विजय सिन्हा" and later shifts to "कांग्रेस चटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाकी है" and "बिहार के डिप्टी CM बने सन्नाट चौधरी". Small portraits of individuals like Dr. Prem Kumar and Vijay Chaudhary appear on the right side of the frame.
